destination.description: S3 Table Bucket ARN (arn:aws:s3tables:...) or S3 path (s3://...) for Glue catalog. This is a String, not a File.

namespace.description: Iceberg namespace. Auto-determined by schema if omitted.

batch_size.description: Number of VCF records per processing batch (default: 100000)

vcf_file.description: S3 URI to the input VCF file (.vcf or .vcf.gz)
